name: cliff
description: CLIFF — Cosmic Level Intelligent Forecast Framework. NASA asteroid threat monitoring with AI + autonomous risk pipeline.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && black --check app/ && isort --check-only app/ && flake8 app/ --max-line-length=127 --extend-ignore=E203,W503
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
